Name: FFullyLoadedPackagesInfo
Description: Struct to help hold information about packages needing to be fully-loaded for DLC, etc.

Variables.Name: Tag
Variables.Description: When this map or gametype is loaded, the packages in the following array will be loaded and added to root, then removed from root when map is unloaded

Variables.Name: PackagesToLoad
Variables.Description: The list of packages that will be fully loaded when the above Map is loaded

Variables.Name: LoadedObjects
Variables.Description: List of objects that were loaded, for faster cleanup
